properties.description: The name of the resource.
A text description of the resource, providing enough detail for discovery and basic understanding of the resource purpose and content.

ECRR resource type classification. Array of labeled links (CreativeWork objects) with name and url pointing to ECRRO resource type URIs. The first entry identifies the base resource type (e.g. Software, Service Instance, Specification). Additional entries may specify subtypes from SPKT_ or srt_ vocabularies.
Legal conditions governing use and access. Array of labeled links identifying the license(s), ideally with URIs from https://spdx.org/licenses/ or http://cor.esipfed.org/ont/earthcube/swl.
External identifier for the resource (e.g. DOI, ARK). Use PropertyValue pattern to specify identifier scheme and resolver URL.
URL of a landing page or web resource describing the resource.
ISO 8601 formatted date when the resource was published or released.
Version number or identifier for this resource.
Alternative names by which the resource is known.
Other identifiers or URIs for the same resource.
Authors or originators of the resource content. Array of Person or Organization objects. Use @list wrapper to preserve author order in JSON-LD.
Other parties who contributed to the resource.
Party that made the resource publicly available.
Editors of the resource.
Funding sources and grants that supported the resource.
identifier for a particular grant
description of the funding or grant
title of the grant
Free-text keywords describing the resource content.
Science domains that the resource addresses. Array of DefinedTerm objects referencing the ECRR ADO (Academic Discipline Ontology) vocabulary.
Target user communities for the resource. Array of Audience objects with audienceType labels and identifiers from the AUT vocabulary.
Label for the target audience (e.g. Data Producers, Scientists, Developers). Values from ECRR AUT vocabulary.
URI from the ECRR AUT_ vocabulary.
Links to formal metadata records or web pages about this resource. Array of labeled links (CreativeWork objects with name and url).
Related resources such as documentation, publications, or tools. Array of labeled links.
Resources (e.g. semantic resources, specifications) that this resource is based on or derived from. Array of labeled links.
Representation formats for the resource content (e.g. MIME types, format names like RDF/XML, Turtle, JSON-LD).
Preferred bibliographic citation for the resource, encoded as a PropertyValue with propertyID of dct:bibliographicCitation.
Specifications or standards that the resource conforms to. Array of labeled links.
Maturity state of the resource. Value is a DefinedTerm from the MTU (Maturity) vocabulary (e.g. In production, Alpha, Planning).
Expected lifetime of the resource. Value is a DefinedTerm from the ELT (Expected Lifetime) vocabulary (e.g. Long-term, >5 years, 1-5 years).
Current usage level of the resource. Value is a DefinedTerm from the UBA (Usage) vocabulary (e.g. Wide usage, Some usage, Low usage).
Stewardship or maintainer of the resource. Value is an agent (Person or Organization) or array of agents responsible for maintenance.
Primary publication about the resource. Value is a citation string.
Registration metadata recording who registered the resource and when. Value is a StructuredValue with contributor (Person) and datePublished.
The representation language of the semantic resource (e.g. OWL, SKOS, RDF). Can be a string or a ComputerLanguage object with name and identifier referencing the MOLA vocabulary.
web-resolveable string for the identifier; host name part is location of a resolver that will return some representation for the given identifier value. E.g. https://doi.org/10.5066/F7VX0DMQ
the identifier string. E.g. 10.5066/F7VX0DMQ
In this context for the schema:PropertyValue, this field is an identifier for the identifier schema, e.g. DOI, ARK.  Get values from https://registry.identifiers.org/registry/ for interoperability
other identifiers for the person
restrict to email only. Schema.org allows telephone and postal contacts as well
if affiliation is present, value must be a schema:Organization.
other identifiers for the organization
identifier for organization
other labels by which the organization might be known
string label for organization that is meaningful for human users
text label for the term that is useful to human user
Identifier for the controlled vocabulary responsible for this keyword.
A representative code for this keyword in the controlled vocabulary (Optional).  Analogous to skos:Notation
other labels by which the person might be known
identifier for person, recommend ORCID
string label for person that is meaningful for human users
URI from the MOLA vocabulary
Name of the representation language (e.g. OWL, SKOS, RDF/XML)
